title: FIGURE 6 in The first late middle Pleistocene Stegodon (Proboscidea, Stegodontidae) evidence found in Peninsular Malaysia
author: Amiruddin, Amir Hakim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: FIGURE 6. In situ and high-throughput μCT images of PRK_SC_P.01. A: lingual view, embedded in cave breccia before extraction. B: lingual view, after extraction but still embedded in matrix. C: the mesial end. D: lingual side in mirror image. E: the underneath view. F: buccal view in mirror image. G: occlusal view, and H: the distal end.
steps_raw: FIGURE 6. In situ and high-throughput μCT images of PRK_SC_P.01. A: lingual view, embedded in cave breccia before extraction. B: lingual view, after extraction but still embedded in matrix. C: the mesial end. D: lingual side in mirror image. E: the underneath view. F: buccal view in mirror image.
